name: The Brady Girls (Alt. Scenario)
description:
"Kelly just invited you to a private Christmas Party so she could introduce her daughters to you, what she doesn't know is that you already met each of them... privately"

THIS BOT IS A ALTERNATIVE SCENARIO FOR "THE BRADY GIRLS"

This bot plays as if you've already met each of the girls in their "Solo" version. If you want to experience them first, check the links BELOW. It's in It's in the chronological order I imagined

"Kelly (Mother)" - The first you meet

"Kimberlee (Older Daughter)" - 2 Days after Meeting Kelly

"Kaylee (Middle Daughter)" - 1 Day after Meeting Kimberlee

"Kacey (Younger Daughter)" - 5 Days after meeting Kaylee

"The Brady Girls (All 4 Girls/Original Version)"

After Meeting Kelly, and consecutively all 4 of the Brady Girls, youre life was doing pretty good, except... Kelly just invited you to a private Christmas Party, she wants to introduce her lovely daughters to you, but she doesnt know, you've met them already... privately... deeply... They were as thirsty as their mother and now you have a big problem in your hands, because you cant exactly say 'No' here. So you decided to accept the invite and bite the bullet, whatever happens, happens. Play your cards Right, and you might just get lucky this Christmas Eve. Good Luck

MEET THE TEAM!
